items.title: Glean’s top line crosses $300M as AI budget-cutting becomes its major selling point
items.summary: The enterprise AI search startup tripled its annual revenue even as tech giants entered the category.

items.title: The internet is being rebuilt for machines
items.summary: As AI agents move from experiments to production, AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated internet traffic instead of human users.

items.title: Asana acquires no-code agent-builder StackAI
items.summary: Asana will incorporate StackAI into its growing suite of AI workflow tools.

items.title: Anthropic raises $65 billion, nears $1T valuation ahead of IPO
items.summary: Anthropic has closed a $65 billion Series H round at a $965 billion post-money valuation, marking what could be the AI startup's final private fundraise before a highly anticipated IPO.

items.title: Just like gold and oil, we’ll soon be able to trade AI token futures
items.summary: Large exchanges are designing derivative products around AI tokens, which are increasingly being considered less a computational output and more a raw material input, like electricity or bandwidth.

items.title: In just 3 weeks, StrictlyVC is coming to Los Angeles
items.summary: StrictlyVC Los Angeles is on June 18. Join for meaningful networking and fireside chats with leaders from Mach Industries, Shinkei Systems, and more. Register today.

items.title: Anthropic releases Opus 4.8 with new ‘dynamic workflow’ tool
items.summary: The new Opus model comes with a tool called Dynamic Workflows, for coordinating swarms of subagents.

items.title: How long is Anthropic’s lease with SpaceX? Opinions vary
items.summary: Elon Musk is publicly reframing xAI’s massive Anthropic compute deal as short-term and cancellable, despite SpaceX’s own S-1 filing describing payments through May 2029.

items.title: Sesame, the conversational AI startup from Oculus founders, launches its iOS app
items.summary: Sesame’s new iOS app brings its conversational AI agents to the public, offering more natural back-and-forth interactions designed to feel less like traditional chatbots and more like talking to a person.

items.title: Catch up on 12 major I/O 2026 moments
items.summary: Here are 12 of the biggest Google I/O 2026 keynote moments, including news about Gemini Omni, Gemini 3.5 Flash and more.

items.title: Sneak peek at new Siri app reveals Apple’s plans to take on ChatGPT and more
items.summary: New renders offer a closer look at Apple’s planned AI overhaul for iOS 27, including a redesigned Siri experience and standalone Siri app.

items.title: RSI is the new AGI — and it’s just as hard to pin down
items.summary: A new crop of AI labs are focused on recursive self-improvement — but the goal is proving elusive.
